# UriContract: uribrowserdocker

<!-- generated by `urisys markpact gen-contract` from manifest.yaml; do not edit by hand. -->

```yaml markpact:contract
apiVersion: urisys.io/v1
kind: UriContract
metadata:
  id: uribrowserdocker.contract
  version: 0.1.0
scheme: browser
queries:
- id: browser.status
  pattern: browser://{session}/query/status
- id: browser.page.dom
  pattern: browser://{session}/page/query/dom
commands:
- id: browser.page.open
  pattern: browser://{session}/page/command/open
  side_effects: true
  requires_approval: true
- id: browser.page.open
  pattern: browser://{session}/page/open
  side_effects: true
  requires_approval: true
- id: browser.page.screenshot
  pattern: browser://{session}/page/command/screenshot
  side_effects: true
  requires_approval: true
- id: browser.page.screenshot
  pattern: browser://{session}/page/active/screenshot
  side_effects: true
  requires_approval: true
- id: browser.form.submit
  pattern: browser://{session}/form/command/submit
  side_effects: true
  requires_approval: true
- id: browser.social.publish_post
  pattern: browser://{session}/social/command/publish-post
  side_effects: true
  requires_approval: true
```
